member.name: M:ims.Controllers.AuthController.Login(ims.DTO.LoginDto)
member.summary: Authenticates a user and returns a JWT token.
member.param: The user's login credentials.
member.returns: An AuthResponseDto containing the JWT token.
member.response: Returns the JWT token and user info.
If the credentials are invalid.

member.name: M:ims.Controllers.AuthController.Register(ims.DTO.RegisterDto)
member.summary: Registers a new user (Admin only).
member.param: The new user's details.
member.response: Returns the newly created user.
If the user already exists or data is invalid.
If the caller is not authenticated.
If the caller is not an Admin.

member.name: M:ims.Controllers.OrderController.GetAll
member.summary: Retrieves all orders (Staff/Manager/Admin).
member.response: Returns the list of orders.
If the caller is not authenticated.
If the caller does not have the required role.

member.name: M:ims.Controllers.OrderController.GetById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a specific order by ID (Staff/Manager/Admin).
member.param: The ID of the order to retrieve.
member.response: Returns the requested order.
If the order is not found.
If the caller is not authenticated.
If the caller does not have the required role.

member.name: M:ims.Controllers.OrderController.Create(ims.Models.Order)
member.summary: Creates a new order (Staff only).
member.param: The details of the order to create.
member.response: Returns the newly created order.
If the caller is not authenticated.
If the caller is not Staff.

member.name: M:ims.Controllers.OrderController.Update(System.Int32,ims.Models.Order)
member.summary: Updates an existing order (Manager/Admin only).
member.param: The ID of the order to update.
The updated order information.
member.response: If the update was successful.
If the ID in the URL does not match the ID in the body.
If the order is not found.
If the caller is not authenticated.
If the caller does not have Manager or Admin roles.

member.name: M:ims.Controllers.OrderController.Delete(System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes an order (Admin only).
member.param: The ID of the order to delete.
member.response: If the deletion was successful.
If the caller is not authenticated.
If the caller is not an Admin.

member.summary: Retrieves all products from the inventory (Manager/Admin only).
member.response: Returns the list of products.
If the caller is not authenticated.
If the caller does not have Manager or Admin roles.

member.response: Returns the requested product.
If the product is not found.
If the caller is not authenticated.
If the caller does not have Manager or Admin roles.

member.summary: Creates a new product (Manager/Admin only).

member.response: Returns the newly created product.
If the input data is invalid.
If the caller is not authenticated.
If the caller does not have Manager or Admin roles.

member.summary: Updates an existing product's information (Manager/Admin only).
member.param: The ID of the product to update.
The updated product information.
member.response: If the update was successful.
If the ID in the URL does not match the ID in the body.
If the product is not found.
If the caller is not authenticated.
If the caller does not have Manager or Admin roles.

member.summary: Deletes a product (Manager/Admin only).

member.returns: A list of orders with supplier information.
member.response: Returns the generated report.

member.name: T:ims.DTO.AuthResponseDto
member.summary: Represents the response returned after a successful authentication.

member.name: P:ims.DTO.AuthResponseDto.Token
member.summary: The JWT bearer token to be used for subsequent authorized requests.

member.name: P:ims.DTO.AuthResponseDto.ExpiresAt
member.summary: The expiration date and time of the token.

member.name: P:ims.DTO.AuthResponseDto.UserName
member.summary: The username of the authenticated user.

member.name: P:ims.DTO.AuthResponseDto.Role
member.summary: The role assigned to the user.

member.name: T:ims.DTO.UserDto
member.summary: A data transfer object representing a user's safe profile information.

member.name: P:ims.DTO.UserDto.Id
member.summary: The unique identifier for the user.

member.name: P:ims.DTO.UserDto.UserName
member.summary: The user's login name.

member.name: P:ims.DTO.UserDto.Role
member.summary: The role assigned to the user (Admin, Manager, Staff).

member.name: T:ims.Helpers.ErrorResponse
member.summary: A standardized error response returned by the API when something goes wrong.

member.name: P:ims.Helpers.ErrorResponse.StatusCode
member.summary: The HTTP status code of the error (e.g., 400, 401, 404, 500).

member.name: P:ims.Helpers.ErrorResponse.Message
member.summary: A human-readable description of the error.

member.name: P:ims.Helpers.ErrorResponse.Errors
member.summary: Additional detailed error messages (e.g., specific validation failures).

member.name: M:ims.Helpers.ErrorResponse.#ctor(System.Int32,System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the ErrorResponse class.
member.param: The HTTP status code.
A descriptive error message.
Optional details or validation errors.

member.name: T:ims.Models.Order
member.summary: Represents a customer or inventory order.

member.name: P:ims.Models.Order.Id
member.summary: The unique identifier for the order.

member.name: P:ims.Models.Order.UserId
member.summary: The ID of the user who created or managed the order.

member.name: P:ims.Models.Order.OrderDate
member.summary: The date and time when the order was placed.

member.name: P:ims.Models.Order.OrderItems
member.summary: The collection of individual line items within this order.

member.name: T:ims.Models.OrderItem
member.summary: Represents a specific product line item within an order.

member.name: P:ims.Models.OrderItem.Id
member.summary: The unique identifier for the order item.

member.name: P:ims.Models.OrderItem.ProductId
member.summary: The ID of the product being ordered.

member.name: P:ims.Models.OrderItem.Quantity
member.summary: The number of units ordered.

member.name: P:ims.Models.OrderItem.UnitPrice
member.summary: The price per unit at the time of the order.

member.name: P:ims.Models.OrderItem.OrderId
member.summary: The ID of the parent order.

member.name: P:ims.Models.OrderItem.Order
member.summary: Navigation property to the parent order.

member.name: T:ims.Models.Product
member.summary: Represents a product in the inventory.

member.name: P:ims.Models.Product.Id
member.summary: The unique identifier for the product.

member.name: P:ims.Models.Product.Name
member.summary: The name of the product.

member.name: P:ims.Models.Product.Description
member.summary: A detailed description of the product.

member.name: P:ims.Models.Product.Price
member.summary: The unit price of the product.

member.name: P:ims.Models.Product.Quantity
member.summary: The quantity of the product currently in stock.

member.name: P:ims.Models.Product.SupplierId
member.summary: The unique identifier of the supplier for this product.

member.name: T:ims.Models.Supplier
member.summary: Represents a company that supplies products to the inventory.

member.name: P:ims.Models.Supplier.Id
member.summary: The unique identifier for the supplier.

member.name: P:ims.Models.Supplier.Name
member.summary: The name of the supplier company.

member.name: P:ims.Models.Supplier.ContactPerson
member.summary: The primary contact person at the supplier company.

member.name: P:ims.Models.Supplier.Email
member.summary: The contact email address of the supplier.

member.name: P:ims.Models.Supplier.Phone
member.summary: The contact phone number of the supplier.

member.name: P:ims.Models.Supplier.Address
member.summary: The physical address of the supplier.

member.name: T:Program
member.summary: Auto-generated public partial Program class for top-level statement apps.
